channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: My Android Windows 95 Theme
item.description: Delete if not allowed, but I just wanted to show off my Windows 95 android theme I put together using an app called "Launcher95" and some extra icons I downloaded. I got the icons for my text and phone apps from (I'm not affiliated with either the app or the Tumblr account, just a nostalgia-lover)....
item.dc:creator: Yahyayo

item.title: Need for speed carbon rework V3 crashes everytime after finishing the intro
item.description: I wanted to play on my Windows 10 latest version the nfsc rework v3 but when i tried to load it, it doesnt work. I cant find an way to repair it. The only thing i tried is to put the game files into the "Games" folder but it still does not work. My PC Specs are: Ryzen 5 5600x, 16gb ddr4 3600mhz,...
item.dc:creator: Zaidpin

item.title: Axios npm Supply Chain Compromise – Guidance for Azure Pipelines Customers
item.description: On March 31, 2026, malicious versions of the widely used JavaScript HTTP client library Axios were briefly published to the npm registry as part of a supply chain attack. The affected versions — 1.14.1 and 0.30.4 — included a hidden malicious dependency that executed during installation and...
item.dc:creator: Josef Sin

item.title: Why does a pop up appear when opening Storage in Windows 11 Settings?
item.description: A pop‑up appears when I open Storage in Settings. Why does this happen? I can still view storage if I click No.
item.dc:creator: KairosRivers

item.title: Windows11 Prompts Secure Boot KEK Update Should I Install It?
item.description: The system showed a "Secure Boot KEK update" notification. What is this, and is it necessary to install?
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: What should I do if my computer won't boot after installing MacDrive on Windows 11?
item.description: Hello, I installed MacDrive on my computer and restarted it, but now I can't boot into the system. How can I fix this?
item.dc:creator: EmmettBrooks

item.title: In Windows 10, clicking the Start menu does not respond
item.description: A few days ago, after a Windows 10 automatic update, the system became very sluggish, and the Start menu stopped responding to clicks. After uninstalling the update and rolling back to the previous version, the sluggishness disappeared, but the Start menu issue persists: none of the Windows-related...
item.dc:creator: FinneasHayes

item.title: Entra and Microsoft 365 Could Improve License Reporting
item.description: License insights is a new feature in the Entra admin center. The Microsoft 365 admin center also shows some license insights in a dashboard card. The two views don’t line up. This isn’t very surprising because different teams generated the information, but it would sure be nice if Microsoft...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: When RAG Isn’t Enough: Moving from Retrieval to Relationship-Aware Systems in Enterprise AI:
item.description: The Problem In an enterprise AI scenario, the goal was to map structured feature data to relevant sections within large technical documents. At a glance, this appears to be a straightforward semantic matching problem. Initial results using semantic search were promising. However, as the system was...
item.dc:creator: ankitasarkar

item.title: When Anthropic’s Managed Agents Meet Microsoft Hosted Agents
item.description: Let’s start from a real engineering pain point. In their engineering blog Managed Agents, Anthropic describes a sobering observation: while building the agent scaffolding (the “harness”) for Claude Sonnet 4.5, they noticed the model suffered from “context anxiety,” so they added context-reset logic...
item.dc:creator: kinfey

item.title: How to backup iphone to external hard drive on my Windows PC
item.description: Greetings,The internal drive is getting pretty full, so storing backups locally isn't really ideal anymore. The Windows 11 PC has 2 TB free storage left. Now, I am trying to figure out a reliable way to back up iPhone to an external hard drive on my Windows PC. From what I understand, iTunes only...
item.dc:creator: Argento665

item.title: Mac system data too large. How to clear system data on mac
item.description: Hi all,Ran into an issue with a Mac where System Data is taking up a huge chunk of storage (over 100GB), and it keeps growing. But it doesn't really show what is inside that category, so it's hard to know what can be deleted safely.Tried a few basic things like emptying Trash, clearing browser...
item.dc:creator: Hupixdel

item.title: Stop Experimenting, Start Building: AI Apps & Agents Dev Days Has You Covered
item.description: The AI landscape has shifted. The question is no longer “Can we build AI applications?” it’s “Can we build AI applications that actually work in production?” Demos are easy. Reliable, scalable, resilient AI systems that handle real-world complexity? That’s where most teams struggle. If you’re an AI...
item.dc:creator: Lee_Stott

item.title: Join our free livestream series on hosting agents in Microsoft Foundry
item.description: Join us for a new 3‑part livestream series where we deploy AI agents on Microsoft Foundry using Microsoft Agent Framework and LangChain/LangGraph, then level them up with tools, observability, and evals. You'll learn how to: Deploy Python agents to Foundry Hosted agents using the Azure Developer...
item.dc:creator: Pamela_Fox

item.title: How to Troubleshoot Azure Functions Host Startup Issue
item.description: Table of Contents Overview Understanding How the Host Starts Up Host Startup Sequence Host States Key Settings That Affect Startup Startup Failure Categories Common Causes and Solutions 1. Missing or Invalid FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION 2. Missing or Mismatched FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME 3. Storage...
item.dc:creator: vikasgupta5

item.title: Host a Microsoft Build //local host Event in Your City
item.description: Content at Microsoft Build will be grounded in technical depth, developer credibility, and hands-on learning and creation. There are a total of 16 sessions available to build your agenda, including 4 labs and 12 breakout sessions, listed below. Labs are approximately 75 minutes in length, while...
item.dc:creator: GalimahB

item.title: Centralizing Enterprise API Access for Agent-Based Architectures
item.description: Problem Statement When building AI agents or automation solutions, calling enterprise APIs directly often means configuring individual HTTP actions within each agent for every API. While this works for simple scenarios, it quickly becomes repetitive and difficult to manage as complexity grows. The...
item.dc:creator: sbaskaran

item.title: Automatic SSO Takeover in Azure AD B2C Custom Policies
item.description: Why This Matters As organizations modernize authentication, many shift toward Single Sign-On (SSO) using providers like Microsoft EntraID. But if you already have users in Azure AD B2C using local accounts (email + password), the transition isn’t straightforward. You’ll run into: Duplicate...
item.dc:creator: anammalu

item.title: Modernizing DNS Security for Exchange Online Mail Flow
item.description: The Domain Name System (DNS) protocol is used by clients to find mail servers over the internet. DNS is unencrypted and unauthenticated by default, making it vulnerable to spoofing, tampering, and adversary‑in‑the‑middle attacks. As threat actors increasingly target the foundational layers of email...
item.dc:creator: The_Exchange_Team

item.title: Test Post
item.description: Azure MCP Server is now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb), enabling one-click installation into Claude Desktop and other MCP-compatible clients. The post Test Post appeared first on Azure SDK Blog.
item.dc:creator: saikumar

item.title: Copilot Chat improvements for pull requests
item.description: GitHub Copilot Chat now provides richer context and new capabilities when you’re working with diffs and pull requests. You can access this functionality by asking a question about a pull… The post Copilot Chat improvements for pull requests appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Global pull requests dashboard moves to opt-out public preview
item.description: The new global pull requests dashboard will be on by default for all GitHub users as the new experience transitions to an opt-out public preview. The new dashboard and inbox… The post Global pull requests dashboard moves to opt-out public preview appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Enabling Agentic Data Governance with Hybrid Cloud Flexibility in Azure
item.description: The “Why” Do you manage data in a complex multi-cloud environment? Are you struggling with data silos, evolving regulations, and the pressure to maintain control and compliance across on-prem and multiple clouds? Do you ever wish an intelligent assistant could help shoulder the load of data...
item.dc:creator: Moaz_Mirza

item.title: Now generally available: License usage insights in Microsoft Entra
item.description: Organizations rely on Microsoft Entra to secure access in an ever-changing identity threat landscape without sacrificing workforce productivity. As organizations adopt advanced identity and access capabilities, IT teams often need greater transparency into how those capabilities are being used,...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dadzie

item.title: Copilot cloud agent fields added to usage metrics
item.description: Following the Copilot coding agent to Copilot cloud agent rename, the Copilot usage metrics API now includes a new used_copilot_cloud_agent field in user-level reports. This boolean field mirrors the existing… The post Copilot cloud agent fields added to usage metrics appeared first on The GitHub...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Dependabot-based dependency graphs for Python
item.description: Python projects will now see more complete and accurate transitive dependency trees in their dependency graphs and Software Bills of Materials (SBOMs). This feature is based on a new type… The post Dependabot-based dependency graphs for Python appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Disable commit comments across your organization
item.description: You can now disable commit comments at the organization level—no more manually updating every repository one by one. A few weeks ago, we added the ability to disable commit comments… The post Disable commit comments across your organization appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: What’s new for .NET in Ubuntu 26.04
item.description: Ubuntu 26.04 (Resolute Raccoon) ships today with .NET 10. Here's how to install .NET 10 from the archive, use the new -resolute container tags, build Native AOT apps, and install .NET 8 and 9 from the dotnet-backports PPA. The post What’s new for .NET in Ubuntu 26.04 appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: Richard Lander

item.title: LangChain.js for Beginners: A Free Course to Build Agentic AI Apps with JavaScript
item.description: Want to build AI agents with JavaScript that go beyond basic chat completions? Agents that reason, call tools, and pull from knowledge bases on their own? We put together a free, open source course to help you get there. LangChain.js for Beginners is 8 chapters and 70+ runnable TypeScript examples....
item.dc:creator: Yohan Lasorsa

item.title: Tenant Configuration Management APIs are now generally available
item.description: In our previous post, we introduced Microsoft Entra Tenant Governance and how it helps organizations secure and manage multi-tenant environments at scale. Today, we’re excited to announce that the Tenant Configuration Management (TCM) APIs are now generally available, providing the foundation for...
item.dc:creator: AdityaMukund

item.title: Better debugging with GitHub Copilot on the web
item.description: GitHub Copilot Chat in github.com helps you get to the root cause of an error faster when you paste a stack trace. Copilot recognizes stack traces more reliably and will… The post Better debugging with GitHub Copilot on the web appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Microsoft 365 multi-agent workflow with Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description: Most production AI tasks are too complex for a single agent. You need specialists that collaborate, a destination expert that researches the best places to visit, a budget analyst that breaks down costs, an activities curator that finds the best experiences, all coordinated by an orchestration...
item.dc:creator: Vincent_Giraud

item.title: View and manage agent sessions from issues and projects
item.description: You can now view and steer cloud agent sessions directly from issues and projects, giving you better visibility into agent activity without leaving your workflow. What’s new Session pill on… The post View and manage agent sessions from issues and projects appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: From Oversharing to Enforcement: A Practical Guide to AI Data Security with Microsoft Purview
item.description: Why AI Changed the Data Security Problem AI does not create entirely new categories of risk—it supercharges existing ones. Traditional data leakage stems from ordinary behavior: sharing a document too broadly, sending an email to the wrong person, copying regulated data to an uncontrolled device....
item.dc:creator: George Smyrlis

item.title: Word Version Incompatibility
item.description: Good morning everyone, I've switched from Microsoft 365 Personal to Microsoft Plus 2021 Business. My question is, is there any incompatibility between the Word versions of these two services? I ask because when I try to work with a file saved as a "Microsoft Word 97-2003 Document," I get a memory...
item.dc:creator: flielguera

item.title: False virus protection alerts on Windows 11 29531.1000
item.description: After updating to Windows 11 build 29531.1000, I keep getting false "Turn on virus protection" alerts even though security is on. Anyone else?
item.dc:creator: DashielQuinn

item.title: Windows 11 vs Windows 11 Pro
item.description: What’s the difference between Windows 11 Home and Pro?
item.dc:creator: Olddies

item.title: The i5-12490F runs Windows 11 25H2 with lag
item.description: My system is configured with an i5-12490F and runs Windows 11 25H2, but it doesn't feel very smooth. When playing CS:GO, the mouse always lags for a few seconds, and sometimes the interface freezes when I click on widgets. Is this a hardware issue or a system optimization issue?
item.dc:creator: bonirl

item.title: Black screen after restarting following a Windows 10 to Windows 11 upgrade
item.description: My system is configured with a 9070XT and 9700RT. After upgrading to Windows 11 and restarting, the screen went black, but I can hear a beep when I click the left mouse button. If I hold down the power button to force a shutdown and then restart, the system boots normally, but I get a message...
item.dc:creator: TrappJean

item.title: Nested folders support in shortcut transformations (Generally Available)
item.description: Nested folders, shortcut transformations, subfolder processing, OneLake, shortcuts, Lakehouse Data lakes rarely come in flat structures. In practice, data is organized across multi-level folder hierarchies, partitioned by date, region, source system, or business unit. Previously, shortcut...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Autopatch - Microsoft 365 Apps Update Rings
item.description: I’m trying to understand how the UpdateDeferredVersions registry value is updated in an Intune Autopatch scenario, specifically the version and FileTime values.Registry path:HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office\ClickToRun\UpdatesExample value:UpdateDeferredVersions = 16.0.19725.20170:13420719560293 |...
item.dc:creator: PaulJebastin

item.title: Resource instance rules for OneLake in Microsoft Fabric (Preview)
item.description: As enterprises adopt OneLake as their unified data lake for analytics, securing how external services access data in OneLake becomes increasingly important—especially in environments where public internet access must be tightly controlled. Today, we’re introducing resource instance rules for...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Azure Monitor Pipeline: A Modern Approach to Telemetry Ingestion at Scale
item.description: Large-scale observability often fails not because of analytics, but because of ingestion. As environments grow—across regions, clouds, and on‑premises sites—traditional log forwarding architectures struggle with scale, reliability, cost, and security. Azure Monitor Pipeline, now generally...
item.dc:creator: adityakumar60

item.title: How AI Agents Are Turning Threat Intelligence Into Validated Detections
item.description: The promise of AI-assisted cybersecurity has long been hampered by a fundamental measurement problem: how do organizations validate whether an AI agent can actually perform the complex, multi-step work that security analysts do every day? Traditional benchmarks test whether models can recall MITRE...
item.dc:creator: adityakumar60

item.title: Surface Laptop/Pro shuts down during Teams Meeting
item.description: Has anyone experienced the issue where their Surface computer suddenly shuts down during a long Teams meeting (with multiple participants)?
item.dc:creator: Thilo Langbein

item.title: Cross-workspace logging for MLflow in Microsoft Fabric: Build MLOps workflows with confidence (Generally Available)
item.description: Machine learning teams need more than a great model — they need a reliable way to move that model from experimentation to production. Cross-workspace logging for MLflow in Microsoft Fabric, is a capability that enables you to build end-to-end MLOps workflows using the standard MLflow APIs you...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Phishing Simulation Training with Teams?
item.description: Hey all,while setting up some Exchange Online Phishing Simulation Training, I saw the (greyd-out) option to use a teams payload when it comes to setting up a phishing simulation. I didnt find any very useful articles, why this is greyed out. Business Premium+ Defender and Purview Suite for BP is...
item.dc:creator: Schnittlauch

item.title: Introducing the Microsoft Sentinel Training Lab. Hands-On Security Operations in Minutes
item.description: A huge thanks to Paul Kew - this lab wouldn't have been possible without his contributions. Security operations is one of those things that’s hard to learn from slides alone. You need to feel what it’s like to triage a multi-stage incident, tune a noisy detection rule, or trace an attacker pivoting...
item.dc:creator: AndreasKapetaniou

item.title: Bester YouTube zu MP3 Konverter für Windows PC?
item.description: Hallo zusammen,ich bin gerade auf der Suche nach einem guten YouTube zu MP3 Konverter für meinen Windows-PC, kenne mich damit aber ehrlich gesagt nicht besonders gut aus. Es gibt so viele Tools online, und ich bin unsicher, welche wirklich sicher und zuverlässig sind.Mir ist wichtig, dass der...
item.dc:creator: Leonardprio

item.title: How to transfer address book from android to iphone after setup without sim
item.description: Hello,I need to move my address book from an Android phone to an iPhone, but I do not want to use a SIM card for the transfer. I am not very familiar with phone data transfer, so I am looking for a simple and safe method that a beginner can follow.Is there an easy way to transfer address book from...
item.dc:creator: Perez
